PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELMER, ANTOINETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKOWSKI, JASON ALLEN MARKOWSKI, ALLEN JOSEPH $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,900.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF ANTOINETTE HELMER AGAINST DEFENDANTS JASON MARKOWSKI AND ALLEN MARKOWSKI, PLUS STATUTORY COSTS. CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT DONALD ARMITSTEAD IS DENIED, WITH EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. ENTERED PER JUDGE DESMOND'S ORDER.
